title: Guidance products, videos, forms and more - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance products, videos, forms and more
Guidance products and policies, videos, forms, toolbox for directors, checklists.

## Services and information

### Charities media gallery
Gallery of videos, transcripts and infographics for both charities and donors
Register for webinars for charities and qualified donees on a variety of topics

### Forms and publications
Find a form and the instructions on how to complete it

### Policies and guidance
Policies and technical information for registered charities

### Checklists for charities
This menu page displays the various checklists available for registered charities

### Other government resources for donors
Information for donors on external and internal resources that will help you to donate wisely

### Federal/Provincial/Territorial Network of Charity Regulators
Working group to discuss issues related to the regulation of charities across Canada

### Technical Issues Working Group
List of sector representatives and their related organizations

### Request publicly available data from the List of charities (Charities Listings)
Use this form to request an electronic version of publicly available data from the List of charities

### Request for registered charity information
Use this form to request copies of publicly available documents and information that is not listed in the List of charities

### External resources for charities
List of related links to Canadian resources of assistances and support for registered charities
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
